description: Find air-quality stations and read pollutant observations from government monitors via OpenAQ v3.
name: io.github.cyanheads/openaq-mcp-server

environmentVariables.description: OpenAQ v3 API key, sent as the X-API-Key header. Free from openaq.org.
environmentVariables.name: OPENAQ_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAQ v3 API base URL override (testing / proxy).
environmentVariables.name: OPENAQ_API_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'duckdb' to enable DataCanvas SQL over large measurement series.
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_PROVIDER_TYPE

environmentVariables.description: The hostname for the HTTP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_HOST

environmentVariables.description: The port to run the HTTP server on.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_PORT

environmentVariables.description: The endpoint path for the MCP server.
environmentVariables.name: MCP_HTTP_ENDPOINT_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Sets the minimum log level for output (e.g., 'debug', 'info', 'warn').
environmentVariables.name: MCP_LOG_LEVEL
